title: Chevening Scholarship 2026/2027 (Fully Funded)
requirements_summary: Must have at least 2 years work experience. Must return to home country for at least 2 years after studies.

title: DAAD Study Scholarships for Graduates (EPOS)
requirements_summary: For professionals from developing countries with at least 2 years of work experience. Must have relevant bachelor's degree.

title: Joint Japan/World Bank Graduate Scholarship Program
requirements_summary: Must be a national of a World Bank member developing country. Must have at least 3 years of paid development-related work experience.

title: Erasmus Mundus Joint Master Degree
requirements_summary: Must apply to at least 3 different EMJMD programmes. Students from Programme Countries have different funding rates than Partner Country students.

title: PhD Position in Machine Learning for Climate Science – ETH Zurich
requirements_summary: Strong background in machine learning, programming (Python), and climate science. Master's degree in CS, Physics, or related field.

title: Beasiswa LPDP Magister & Doktor 2026
requirements_summary: Warga Negara Indonesia dengan IPK minimal 3.0. Bersedia kembali ke Indonesia setelah studi.

title: Beasiswa Kemitraan Negara Berkembang (KNB) 2026

host_entity.name: Kementerian Pendidikan Tinggi, Sains, dan Teknologi

requirements_summary: Open to citizens of developing countries. Must have a bachelor's degree and meet GPA requirements.

title: Fulbright Foreign Student Program – Master's
requirements_summary: For non-US citizens to study in the US. Must demonstrate English proficiency and leadership potential.

title: MSc Scholarship in Computer Science – University of Helsinki
requirements_summary: Outstanding academic record in Computer Science. Must apply for admission to the MSc programme simultaneously.

title: Commonwealth PhD Scholarships 2026
requirements_summary: For citizens of eligible Commonwealth countries. Must demonstrate potential for leadership and impact in home country.

title: Fulbright Master's Degree Scholarship for Indonesians
requirements_summary: WNI, minimal 3 tahun pengalaman kerja, IPK minimal 3.0. Harus kembali ke Indonesia setelah studi.

title: PhD Position in Bioinformatics – Karolinska Institutet
requirements_summary: Master's degree in Bioinformatics, Computer Science, or related field. Experience with genomics data analysis.

title: AUN/SEAR-PUP International Scholarships 2026
requirements_summary: For ASEAN and developing country students. Must demonstrate academic excellence.

title: KOICA Degree Program Scholarship 2026
requirements_summary: For citizens of KOICA partner developing countries. Must be under 40 years old. Government nomination required.

title: Turing Scholarships – University of Manchester
requirements_summary: Outstanding academic record in Computer Science or Mathematics. Must hold an offer for an eligible MSc programme.

title: Aga Khan Foundation International Scholarship Programme
requirements_summary: Half grant, half loan. For students from developing countries. Must demonstrate financial need.

title: Gates Cambridge Scholarship 2026 (Fully Funded)
requirements_summary: Outstanding academic record, strong research proposal, and demonstrated commitment to improving the lives of others. Must apply to a course at Cambridge first.

title: PhD Position in Quantum Computing – University of Oxford
requirements_summary: Master's degree in Physics, Computer Science, or Mathematics with strong background in quantum mechanics. Programming experience required.

title: Beasiswa LPDP Doktor Luar Negeri 2026
requirements_summary: Warga Negara Indonesia dengan IPK minimal 3.2 (S2) atau 3.0 (S1). Memiliki LoA dari universitas tujuan. Bersedia kembali ke Indonesia.

title: Rhodes Scholarship 2026 for International Students
requirements_summary: Exceptional academic achievement, integrity, leadership potential, and commitment to service. Age limit varies by country (typically 18-28).

title: MEXT Japanese Government Scholarship 2026

host_entity.name: Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology Japan

requirements_summary: Must apply through Japanese Embassy in home country. Age limit of 35. Strong academic record required.

title: PhD Position in Artificial Intelligence – TU Munich
requirements_summary: Master's degree with strong research background in AI/ML. Publications in top conferences preferred.

title: Vice-Chancellor's International Scholarship – University of Sydney

other_benefits: Tuition fee reduction or full waiver

requirements_summary: Outstanding academic record. Must have applied for admission to the University of Sydney. Limited number available.

title: Beasiswa LPDP Parsial & Afirmasi 2026
requirements_summary: Program afirmasi untuk daerah tertinggal, difabel, dan afirmasi gender. WNI dengan IPK minimal 2.75.

title: DAAD Scholarship for Indonesian Students – Master's in Germany 2026
requirements_summary: Untuk WNI dengan IPK minimal 3.0 (S1) atau 3.2 (S2). Pengalaman kerja minimal 2 tahun untuk program tertentu.

title: World Bank Graduate Scholarship for Development 2026
requirements_summary: For applicants from developing countries with at least 3 years of development-related work experience. Must be under 45.

title: Postdoctoral Fellowship in Astrophysics – Max Planck Institute
requirements_summary: PhD in Astrophysics, Physics or related field. Strong publication record. Experience with numerical simulations.

title: Beasiswa KNB 2026/2027 – Program Doktor

host_entity.name: Kementerian Pendidikan Tinggi, Sains, dan Teknologi

requirements_summary: Open to citizens of developing countries. Must have a Master's degree with minimum GPA 3.0.

title: Erasmus Mundus Joint PhD in Environmental Science
requirements_summary: Master's degree required. Must have research experience in environmental science. Mobility between at least 2 European universities.

title: University of Bologna International Scholarships 2026
requirements_summary: Outstanding academic record. Need-based financial aid also available. SAT/ACT scores considered for bachelor's applicants.

title: Taiwan ICDF International Higher Education Scholarship 2026

host_entity.name: Taiwan International Cooperation and Development Fund (ICDF)

requirements_summary: For students from partner developing countries. Must be under 35 (master's) or 40 (PhD). Strong academic background.

title: PhD Fellowship in Cancer Biology – Karolinska Institutet
requirements_summary: Master's degree in Biology, Biomedicine or related field. Experience in molecular biology techniques. Strong research background.

title: Amsterdam Merit Scholarship – University of Amsterdam
requirements_summary: Non-EEA students with outstanding academic record. Must have applied for admission to an eligible Master's programme.

title: ANID Scholarship – Fully Funded PhD in Chile

host_entity.name: ANID (National Agency of Research and Development)

requirements_summary: Open to international students. Master's degree required. Research proposal in line with Chile's national development priorities.

title: Commonwealth Master's Scholarships 2026
requirements_summary: For citizens of eligible Commonwealth countries. Must demonstrate potential for development impact in home country.

title: DAAD Research Grants for Doctoral Candidates 2026
requirements_summary: Highly qualified doctoral candidates. Research proposal must be coordinated with a German university supervisor.

title: Fulbright Foreign Student Program – PhD 2026
requirements_summary: For non-US citizens to pursue doctoral studies in the US. Strong academic record, leadership potential, and cultural exchange commitment.

title: Swiss Government Excellence Scholarships 2026
requirements_summary: For international students and researchers. Application process varies by home country. Must have academic host in Switzerland.

title: Fulbright Doctoral Degree Scholarship for Indonesians 2026
requirements_summary: WNI, memiliki gelar Master, IPK minimal 3.0, dan memiliki LoA dari universitas AS. Harus kembali ke Indonesia setelah studi.

title: KOICA PhD Program Scholarship 2026
requirements_summary: For citizens of KOICA partner countries. Master's degree required. Under 40 years old. Government nomination required.

title: McDonnell International Scholars Academy – Washington University
requirements_summary: Outstanding academic record with strong leadership potential. Must apply for admission to WashU. Collaborative mindset required.

title: Beasiswa LPDP Target Mandiri Luar Negeri 2026
requirements_summary: Program khusus untuk PTN dan Kementerian/Lembaga. Mendanai studi S2/S3 di PT luar negeri terbaik. LoA dari PT tujuan wajib.

title: Chinese Government Scholarship (CSC) 2026
requirements_summary: Apply through Chinese Embassy or designated university channels. Strong academic record. Age limit varies by degree level.

title: PhD Position in Sustainable Energy – Delft University of Technology
requirements_summary: Master's degree in Engineering, Physics or related field. Experience with energy systems modeling. Strong analytical skills.

title: University of Melbourne Graduate Research Scholarships
requirements_summary: Outstanding academic record. Research proposal required. Must have secured supervisor support.

title: Chevening ASEAN Leadership Programme 2026
requirements_summary: ASEAN nationals preferred. At least 2 years work experience. Leadership potential is the primary selection criterion.

title: Turkey Burslari Scholarship 2026

host_entity.name: Republic of Turkey Ministry of National Education

requirements_summary: Open to all nationalities with age limits (21 for bachelor's, 30 for master's, 35 for PhD). Academic merit and language skills considered.

title: Harvard University MBA Scholarship – Based on Need
requirements_summary: Need-based financial aid for admitted MBA students. All admitted students are automatically considered. Top-tier GMAT/GRE required.

title: PhD Studentship in Marine Biology – University of Tokyo
requirements_summary: Master's degree in Marine Biology, Oceanography or related field. Fieldwork experience and Japanese language proficiency preferred.

title: University of British Columbia International Scholar Awards
requirements_summary: Outstanding academic achievement and leadership potential. Must apply for admission to UBC separately. Renewable based on performance.
